mapper.select: SELECT device_id, member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, nx, ny, is_main, ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh, charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency, electricity_rate FROM ess_device WHERE IFNULL(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND status != 'OFFLINE' ORDER BY device_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring ( device_id, voltage, current_a, soc, power_output, solar_generation_kwh, charged_energy_kwh, used_energy_kwh, saved_cost, record_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{voltage}, #{currentA}, #{soc}, #{powerOutput}, #{solarGenerationKwh}, #{chargedEnergyKwh}, #{usedEnergyKwh}, #{savedCost}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO energy_log ( device_id, daily_kwh, cost, efficiency, log_date ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{dailyKwh}, #{cost}, #{efficiency}, CURDATE() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE daily_kwh = daily_kwh + VALUES(daily_kwh), cost = cost + VALUES(cost), efficiency = VALUES(efficiency)

INSERT INTO ess_alert ( device_id, alert_type, alert_level, message, status, created_at ) SELECT #{deviceId}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{message}, 'OPEN', NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ess_alert WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND alert_type = #{alertType} AND status = 'OPEN' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) )
mapper.select: SELECT weather_id, device_id, base_date, base_time, fcst_date, fcst_time, sky_status, rain_type, rain_prob, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation, sunrise, sunset, ess_status, created_at FROM weather_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND fcst_date = #{fcstDate} AND fcst_time >= #{fcstTime} ORDER BY fcst_time ASC, base_date DESC, base_time DESC LIMIT 1
